content.thinking:
Let me check the current time: Monday, June 8th, 2026 — 04:47 (Asia/Shanghai)

This is 04:47 AM - well before the work day starts (9:30). According to HEARTBEAT.md:
- 工作日 9:30-11:30 — 上午工作时段
- 工作日 13:30-18:00 — 下午工作时段

- 18:00 之后 — 下班时间，不打扰

04:47 AM is outside all work hours, so I should just reply HEARTBE
